name: IdsDominionProvAddrRowCntBal

text.value: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.f6c2_TMP_IdsDominionProvAddrRowCntBal; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.f6c2_TMP_IdsDominionProvAddrRowCntBal_Research; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.f6c2_TMP_IdsDominionProvAddrRowCntBal_Notify; WITH mainQuery AS (SELECT PROV_ADDR.SRC_SYS_CD_SK as TRGT_SRC_SYS_CD_SK, PROV_ADDR.PROV_ADDR_ID as TRGT_PROV_ADDR_ID, PROV_ADDR.PROV_ADDR_TYP_CD_SK as TRGT_PROV_ADDR_TYP_CD_SK, PROV_ADDR.PROV_ADDR_EFF_DT_SK as TRGT_PROV_ADDR_EFF_DT_SK, B_PROV_ADDR.SRC_SYS_CD_SK as SRC_SYS_CD_SK, B_PROV_ADDR.PROV_ADDR_ID, B_PROV_ADDR.PROV_ADDR_TYP_CD_SK, B_PROV_ADDR.PROV_ADDR_EFF_DT_SK FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG MPPNG, @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.PROV_ADDR PROV_ADDR FULL OUTER JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.B_PROV_ADDR B_PROV_ADDR ON PROV_ADDR.PROV_ADDR_ID = B_PROV_ADDR.PROV_ADDR_ID AND PROV_ADDR.PROV_ADDR_TYP_CD_SK = B_PROV_ADDR.PROV_ADDR_TYP_CD_SK AND PROV_ADDR.PROV_ADDR_EFF_DT_SK = B_PROV_ADDR.PROV_ADDR_EFF_DT_SK AND PROV_ADDR.SRC_SYS_CD_SK = B_PROV_ADDR.SRC_SYS_CD_SK WHERE PROV_ADDR.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK >= @{pipeline().parameters.ExtrRunCycle} AND PROV_ADDR.SRC_SYS_CD_SK = MPPNG.CD_MPPNG_SK AND MPPNG.TRGT_CD = '@{pipeline().parameters.SrcSysCd}'), research AS (SELECT * FROM mainQuery WHERE TRGT_PROV_ADDR_ID IS NULL OR PROV_ADDR_ID IS NULL), notify AS (SELECT CASE WHEN '@{pipeline().parameters.ToleranceCd}' = 'OUT' THEN 'ROW COUNT BALANCING ' + @{pipeline().parameters.SrcSysCd} + ' - IDS PROV ADDR OUT OF TOLERANCE' END as NOTIFICATION) SELECT * INTO @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.f6c2_TMP_IdsDominionProvAddrRowCntBal FROM mainQuery; SELECT * INTO @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.f6c2_TMP_IdsDominionProvAddrRowCntBal_Research FROM research; SELECT * INTO @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.f6c2_TMP_IdsDominionProvAddrRowCntBal_Notify FROM notify WHERE NOTIFICATION IS NOT NULL;

sqlReaderQuery.value: SELECT TRGT_SRC_SYS_CD_SK, TRGT_PROV_ADDR_ID, TRGT_PROV_ADDR_TYP_CD_SK, TRGT_PROV_ADDR_EFF_DT_SK, SRC_SYS_CD_SK, PROV_ADDR_ID, PROV_ADDR_TYP_CD_SK, PROV_ADDR_EFF_DT_SK FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.f6c2_TMP_IdsDominionProvAddrRowCntBal_Research

Description:
Calling Job: DominionIdsProvAddrBalSeq

Description: This job does a full outer join between PROV_ADDR table and B_PROV_ADDR and writes the missing data in either of those table to a file for research and sends a notification file.
